stories.headline: Aave-led coalition floats rescue plan for 116,500 unbacked rsETH from Kelp DAO exploit
stories.tldr: DeFi United proposed using Aave to neutralize 116,500 unbacked rsETH and stabilize markets after the $292M KelpDAO bridge exploit.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: It's the first cross-protocol containment playbook for a liquid-restaking blow-up — if it works, expect it to become the template every LRT issuer reaches for next.
the_details: DeFi United coalition published technical proposal April 28 via CoinDesk to wind down 116,500 unbacked rsETH minted in the bridge breach.
KelpDAO's April 18 exploit drained $292M after a single forged signature approved a cross-chain mint of rsETH.
Plan routes Aave liquidity to absorb the unbacked supply and shield depositors from a cascading depeg.

stories.headline: BTC slips to $76.5K, ETH hits one-week low at $2,303 as FOMC opens
stories.tldr: Bitcoin gave up the $77K level and Ethereum logged its lowest open in a week as traders de-risked into a two-day Fed meeting.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Three straight holds and a hot inflation print mean the rate-cut bet that was fueling the late-March rally is officially in retreat.
the_details: BTC opened at $77,368, fell to $76,472 by 7:10am ET after stalling at $79,500 earlier in the week.
ETH opened the session at $2,303.33, its weakest open in over seven days; analysts now eye $2,800–3,000 only on a clean BTC break above $85K.
FOMC decision lands April 29 with rates expected unchanged for a third straight meeting.

stories.headline: UMich consumer sentiment crashes to all-time low 49.8 as inflation expectations spike to 4.8%
stories.tldr: April's University of Michigan reading hit the lowest level on record as Iran-driven oil shock pushed one-year inflation expectations from 3.8% to 4.8%.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Stagflation tape is the worst possible setup for risk assets — it kills the Fed's room to cut and re-anchors the dollar bid that's been crushing BTC.
the_details: UMich consumer sentiment index printed 49.8 in April, an all-time low, per CoinDesk Daybook April 28.
One-year inflation expectations jumped 100 bps to 4.8% from 3.8% in March.
DXY-BTC inverse correlation just hit its most extreme reading in nearly four years.

stories.headline: Babylon Foundation to park $3M USDT in Aave as BTCfi treasury hunts yield
stories.tldr: Babylon's foundation will deposit 3 million USDT into Aave, signaling that even Bitcoin-staking treasuries are routing idle stablecoins through blue-chip lending.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: BTCfi protocols sitting on stable reserves rotating into Aave instead of T-bills tightens DeFi's grip on institutional cash management.
the_details: Babylon Foundation announced the $3M USDT Aave deposit on April 28.
Aave's overall TVL benefits as DeFi market cap rose 3.3% in 24h to $56.2B with $5.05B in volume.
Move follows a wider 2026 trend of foundations parking treasury cash in audited DeFi venues over money-market funds.

stories.headline: Jupiter unlocks $9.67M of JUP today, diluting circulating supply by 1.54%
stories.tldr: Solana DEX aggregator Jupiter released 1.54% of its circulating JUP supply, worth roughly $9.67 million at current prices, into the market April 28.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Scheduled unlocks land into a soft tape — every cliff like this resets the floor for token-flow narratives across Solana DeFi blue chips.
the_details: Unlock equals approximately $9.67M at the current JUP spot price.
Represents 1.54% of circulating supply hitting the market in a single tranche.
Comes as the CMC Altcoin Season Index reads 39/100, deep in 'Bitcoin Season' territory.
